00_overview.title: Overview and Workspace Setup
00_overview.description: Review the strategy, verify prerequisites, initialize workspace.

01_deterministic_eval.title: Make Evaluation Deterministic
01_deterministic_eval.description: Fix all random seeds in prepare.py and train.py to eliminate evaluation noise.

01a_verify_determinism.title: Verify Deterministic Evaluation
01a_verify_determinism.description: Run the same train.py 5 times, verify identical val_bpb.

01b_debug_determinism.title: Debug Non-Determinism Sources
01b_debug_determinism.description: Identify and fix remaining sources of non-determinism.

02_power_calibration.title: Power Calibration: d00 vs d10
02_power_calibration.description: Run d00 and d10 with deterministic eval, 5 replicates each, 45-min budget.

02a_analyze_calibration.title: Analyze Calibration Results
02a_analyze_calibration.description: Compute effect sizes, mode counts, cost variance from calibration data.

02b_decision_gate.title: Decision Gate: Proceed, Extend, or Escalate
02b_decision_gate.description: Evaluate calibration: Cohen's d, mode diversity, and decide path forward.

02c_extended_calibration.title: Extended Calibration: Longer Budget
02c_extended_calibration.description: Re-run calibration with 60-min agent budget for more training attempts.

03_full_2x2_run.title: Full 2x2 Experiment
03_full_2x2_run.description: Run all 4 cells with deterministic eval, 5 replicates, 60-min budget.

03a_mode_labeling.title: Mode Labeling Upgrade and Execution
03a_mode_labeling.description: Upgrade label_modes.py to two-level labeling, apply to all runs.

03b_decomposition.title: Compute Full Decomposition
03b_decomposition.description: Run corrected decomposition on all reps with upgraded mode labels.

03c_identity_check.title: Verify Accounting Identity
03c_identity_check.description: Check if delta approx cost + phi + G - epsilon + R for each cell and axis.

04_escalation_cifar100.title: Escalation: Switch to CIFAR-100
04_escalation_cifar100.description: Modify prepare.py to load CIFAR-100, re-enter the main pipeline.

05_structured_search.title: Fallback: Structured Hyperparameter Search
05_structured_search.description: Replace free-form code editing with structured config search.

06_theorem_update.title: Revise Theorem Based on Evidence
06_theorem_update.description: Update theorem statement, assumptions, and proof based on experimental findings.

07_final_report.title: Generate Final Report
07_final_report.description: Synthesize all evidence into a publication-ready report.
